title: VendorResponse
description: Verified-vendor public response on a catalog item (PRD §11.2). Transparency over erasure — old versions retained; the latest version renders on the report page. Body is Markdown, 2000-char cap per PRD B-8.

vendorVerificationId.description: FK to the verification that authorised this response.

bodyMarkdown.description: Markdown body. Server-rendered; safe-listed Markdown (CommonMark + tables, no raw HTML).

version.description: Monotonic version per catalog item — old versions retained for the public audit trail.

examples.bodyMarkdown: The flagged Unicode characters at line 42 are intentional — they encode the tool's i18n marker. Documented in `docs/i18n.md`. We've added a comment to clarify.
